name: Royal Rajasthan Odyssey
shortDescription: Forts, palaces, and desert sunsets across the land of maharajas. Experience royalty in every step.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Jaipur – The Pink City
itinerary.description: Arrive at Jaipur airport. Check-in at heritage haveli hotel. Evening walk through the Albert Hall Museum and local bazaars.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Full day tour: Amber Fort elephant ride, Hawa Mahal photo stop, City Palace, Jantar Mantar (UNESCO). Evening at Chokhi Dhani for folk dinner.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Drive 6 hrs to the Blue City. Visit Mehrangarh Fort perched dramatically on a hill, and Jaswant Thada marble memorial.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
itinerary.description: Travel to the Golden City. Explore the walled old city and Patwon Ki Haveli in the evening.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer Desert Day
itinerary.description: Morning at Jaisalmer Fort. Afternoon camel safari in Sam Sand Dunes. Sunset bonfire and overnight desert camp under the stars.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
itinerary.description: Scenic drive to the City of Lakes. Check-in with a Lake Pichola view. Evening free to explore the lakeside.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Exploration
itinerary.description: City Palace, Jagdish Temple, boat ride on Lake Pichola passing the Lake Palace Hotel. Saheliyon Ki Bari gardens.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping for textiles and blue pottery. Transfer to Udaipur airport. Tour ends with golden memories.

name: Kerala Backwaters & Spice Trail
shortDescription: Houseboat cruises, misty tea hills, and ancient Ayurveda in God's Own Country.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi – The Queen of the Arabian Sea
itinerary.description: Arrive at Kochi airport. Explore Fort Kochi's Chinese fishing nets, Mattancherry Palace, and the Jewish Synagogue.

itinerary.title: Kochi to Munnar
itinerary.description: Scenic 3-hour drive through winding mountain roads into the tea country. Visit Eravikulam National Park (home of the Nilgiri Tahr).

itinerary.title: Munnar Tea Country
itinerary.description: Tea museum, spice garden walk, Top Station viewpoint. Sunset at Mattupetty Dam. Evening at leisure in the cool hill air.

itinerary.title: Munnar to Alleppey
itinerary.description: Drive down the mountains through rubber plantations. Board your private houseboat by noon at Alleppey (Alappuzha).

itinerary.title: Houseboat Cruise – The Venice of the East
itinerary.description: Lazy morning cruise through narrow village canals. Visit paddy fields, coconut groves, and village life. Sunset on Vembanad Lake.

itinerary.title: Departure from Kochi
itinerary.description: Morning Ayurveda consultation and massage session. Transfer to Kochi airport for your departure.

inclusions: Houseboat stay with all meals on board

name: Himalayan Himachal Explorer
shortDescription: Snow peaks, apple orchards, Buddhist monasteries and roaring rivers in the lap of the Himalayas.

itinerary.title: Arrive Manali
itinerary.description: Arrive at Manali. Settle into your mountain hotel. Evening stroll on Mall Road and explore local Tibetan market.

itinerary.title: Local Manali Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Hadimba Devi Temple in its cedar forest, Manu Temple, Tibetan Monastery, Van Vihar park. Vashisht hot sulphur springs in the evening.

itinerary.title: Rohtang Pass Day Trip
itinerary.description: Early morning drive to Rohtang Pass (subject to permits & weather). Snow activities at 13,050 ft. Stunning Lahaul Valley views on the way.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley Adventure
itinerary.description: Solang Valley for paragliding (weather permitting), zorbing, and cable car rides with panoramic Himalayan views. Afternoon at leisure.

itinerary.title: Manali to Kasol
itinerary.description: Drive through the lush Parvati Valley to the riverside hamlet of Kasol. Riverside bonfire and camping.

itinerary.title: Kheerganga Trek
itinerary.description: Trek 12km through pine forests to Kheerganga's sacred hot springs at 2,960m. Dip in the natural hot water pool surrounded by snowy peaks.

itinerary.title: Return to Manali & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive back to Manali for your bus or flight connection. Tour ends with mountain memories to last a lifetime.

name: Sacred Varanasi & Prayagraj Pilgrimage
shortDescription: Witness the eternal city where life, death, and the divine flow together on the banks of Mother Ganga.

itinerary.title: Arrive Varanasi – The Eternal City
itinerary.description: Arrive and check in to a ghat-view hotel. Evening Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat — India's most hypnotic spiritual spectacle.

itinerary.title: Varanasi Deep Dive
itinerary.description: Pre-dawn boat ride on the Ganga to watch sunrise over 84 ghats. Visit Kashi Vishwanath Temple. Explore the ancient narrow lanes (gallis) of the old city.

itinerary.title: Sarnath & Travel to Prayagraj
itinerary.description: Morning excursion to Sarnath where the Buddha gave his first sermon. Dhamek Stupa, Sarnath Museum. Afternoon drive to Prayagraj.

itinerary.title: Sangam & Departure
itinerary.description: Boat ride at the holy Triveni Sangam — confluence of Ganga, Yamuna, and the mythical Saraswati. Visit Anand Bhawan. Departure.

name: Andaman Island Escape
shortDescription: Pristine white beaches, coral reefs, and jewel-blue waters at the edge of the Indian Ocean.

itinerary.title: Arrive Port Blair
itinerary.description: Arrive at Port Blair's Veer Savarkar airport. Check-in and rest. Evening visit to the iconic Cellular Jail followed by its emotional light & sound show.

itinerary.title: Port Blair Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Ross Island (former British capital, now overrun by deer), North Bay Island snorkelling, and a sunset at Corbyn's Cove beach.

itinerary.title: Ferry to Havelock Island
itinerary.description: Morning ferry (2 hrs) to Havelock Island. Check-in to beach resort. Afternoon at the legendary Radhanagar Beach — rated Asia's best beach.

itinerary.title: Havelock Water Adventures
itinerary.description: Full day at Elephant Beach — scuba diving introduction dive and snorkelling over vibrant coral reefs. Glass-bottom boat ride.

itinerary.title: Havelock to Neil Island
itinerary.description: Short ferry to Neil Island. Natural Rock Bridge (unique coral formation), relaxed day at Bharatpur Beach. Fresh seafood dinner.

itinerary.title: Return to Port Blair & Departure
itinerary.description: Morning ferry back to Port Blair. Last-minute shopping for shells and pearls. Transfer to airport.

name: Northeast Frontier – Meghalaya & Assam
shortDescription: Living root bridges, one-horned rhinos, Brahmaputra cruises, and mist-covered Khasi Hills.

itinerary.title: Arrive Guwahati
itinerary.description: Arrive Guwahati. Visit the powerful Kamakhya Temple on Nilachal Hill. Evening Brahmaputra river cruise at sunset.

itinerary.title: Kaziranga National Park
itinerary.description: Drive to Kaziranga. Check-in to jungle resort. Evening jeep safari across the grasslands.

itinerary.title: Kaziranga to Shillong
itinerary.description: Dawn elephant safari for guaranteed one-horned rhino sightings. Drive to Shillong — the Scotland of the East. Visit Elephant Falls.

itinerary.title: Shillong Exploration
itinerary.description: Ward's Lake, Don Bosco Museum of Northeast Cultures, Police Bazar local market. Try jadoh and tungrymbai for lunch.

itinerary.title: Cherrapunji Day Trip
itinerary.description: Nohkalikai Falls (India's tallest plunge waterfall), Mawsmai Caves, Seven Sisters Falls viewpoint.

itinerary.title: Living Root Bridges Trek
itinerary.description: Trek down into Nongriat village to see the iconic double-decker living root bridges — grown by the Khasi people over centuries. Challenging but unforgettable.

itinerary.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong
itinerary.description: Crystal-clear Dawki River bordering Bangladesh. Visit Mawlynnong — Asia's cleanest village. Bamboo skywalk at treetop level.

itinerary.title: Majuli Island
itinerary.description: Drive + ferry across the Brahmaputra to Majuli — the world's largest river island and centre of Vaishnavite culture. Sattra monastery visit.

itinerary.title: Return Guwahati & Departure
itinerary.description: Morning ferry back to the mainland. Drive to Guwahati airport. Farewell to the misty Northeast.

inclusions: 8 nights accommodation (hotels + jungle resort + monastery stay)
